quizQuestion:
バカ{___}ことするな！
(Don't do something that stupid!)
pedagogicalNote: な(prohibition) = don't do (command); なさい = do (informal imperative); 方がいい = it would be better to; べき = should; てはいけない = must not; てもいいですか = may I/do you mind if
